entities.name: COLLETOTRICHUM SUBLINEOLUM
entities.description: The fungal causal agent of sorghum anthracnose investigated in six Indian populations

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The host crop affected by anthracnose and used in virulence testing

entities.name: ANTHRACNOSE
entities.description: The disease caused by Colletotrichum sublineolum in sorghum

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the fungal isolates were collected

entities.name: INDORE
entities.description: One of the six locations in India where isolates were studied

entities.name: SURAT
entities.description: One of the six locations in India where isolates were studied

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: One of the six locations in India where isolates were studied

entities.name: DHARWAD
entities.description: One of the six locations in India where isolates were studied

entities.name: UDAIPUR
entities.description: One of the six locations in India where isolates were studied

entities.name: PANTNAGAR
entities.description: One of the six locations in India where isolates were studied

entities.name: MULTI-LOCATION FIELD EVALUATION
entities.description: Field trials conducted across six locations over 4-5 years to test sorghum lines

entities.name: GREENHOUSE TESTS
entities.description: Controlled environment tests conducted on sorghum lines at the seedling stage

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL SORGHUM ANTHRACNOSE VIRULENCE NURSERY
entities.description: A collection of 16 sorghum lines used to evaluate the virulence of anthracnose isolates

entities.name: DISEASE REACTION
entities.description: A measure of plant response to infection scored as R, MR, or S

entities.name: DISEASE SEVERITY
entities.description: A measure of infection intensity scored on a 1-9 scale based on leaf area covered with lesions

entities.name: VIRULENCE
entities.description: The ability of the pathogen to cause disease, measured by disease reaction

entities.name: AGGRESSIVENESS
entities.description: The degree of disease severity caused by the pathogen

entities.name: RAPD ANALYSIS
entities.description: Random amplified polymorphic DNA analysis used to determine genetic dissimilarities among isolates
